created.purpose: Load and write promotion state artifacts from disk
Validate operator actions against authority model with 5 RBAC roles and 7 non-automatable boundaries
Append-only event writer for promotion_event_log.jsonl with semantic_disposition
12-action orchestrator: validate → snapshot → mutate → event → replay validate
SSR data resolver for authority page
Layout shell for authority page with disclaimer footer
S-level, authority ceiling, lane summary, insufficiency status
Review obligations with per-item affordances and operational acceptance language
Qualification advancement, insufficiency acknowledge with permanent toggle
Blocker list with authority domain and resolution path
Canonical runtime substrate discovery — probes static and operational paths, resolves capabilities and section availability

modified.change: Added 'authority' to COCKPIT_SECTIONS, SECTION_ROUTES, and SECTION_LABELS

Capability-driven rendering: accepts runtimeCapabilities/sectionAvailability, passes sectionAvailability to SQONavigation, overview shows capability-aware message with available section links when no journey
Added OperatorAuthorityWorkflowPanel import and authority section renderer

Integrated SQORuntimeResolver: isCritical now derived from anyCapabilityAvailable, sectionData initialized as empty object instead of null, runtime capabilities and section availability passed through to client
Accepts sectionAvailability prop — runtime-available sections override degradation unavailable marking

mutated_at_runtime.change: insufficiency_acknowledged, insufficiency_permanent, insufficiency_justification added by operator action
